title: medicago monantha subsp. noeana
intro: Medicago monantha subsp. noeana, also known as spotted medic or white medic, is a subspecies of annual or biennial legume native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its saponin and flavonoid content, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Medicago monantha subsp. noeana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
